# subscript(_:_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Accesses a value in the row you select by a column name and type.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript<T>(columnName: String, type: T.Type) -> T? { get set }
```

## Parameters

- **columnName**: The name of a column.
- **type**: The type of the column.

## Accessing Elements

- **subscript(_:)**: Accesses a value at a column index.
- **subscript(_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column name.
- **subscript(_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column identifier.
- **subscript(_:_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column index and type.
